spellLists.name: Monk's Sense
spellLists.summary: Monk's Sense includes Sly Ears, Nightvision, Sidevision, Scent, Watervision, Fogvision, and related spells.

spellLists.name: Delving Ways
spellLists.summary: Open Essence information spells for analyzing text, stone, metal, gas, liquid, and item construction.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Text Analysis I
spells.description: Lets the caster read text in an unknown written language well enough to understand basic concepts, equivalent to rank 2 written-language knowledge.

spells.name: Stone Analysis
spells.description: Reveals the nature and origin of natural stone, and when and how worked stone was obtained and worked.

spells.name: Metal Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, but examines metal.

spells.name: Gas Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, but examines gas.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Text Analysis II
spells.description: As Text Analysis I, but gives complete technical analysis of vocabulary and syntax, not idioms or cultural references; equivalent to rank 5 written-language knowledge.

spells.name: Liquid Analysis
spells.description: As Stone Analysis, but examines liquid.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Delving
spells.description: Gives significant details about an item's construction and purpose, but not its specific powers.

spellLists.name: Detecting Ways
spellLists.summary: Open Essence detection spells for realms, invisible things, traps, evil, locations, and power.

spells.name: Detect Essence
spells.description: Detects active Essence spells or items; the caster may concentrate on one 5' radius area each round.

spells.name: Detect Mentalism
spells.description: As Detect Essence, but detects Mentalism.

spells.name: Detect Channeling
spells.description: As Detect Essence, but detects Channeling.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Detect Invisible
spells.description: As Detect Essence, but detects invisible things; attacks against detected invisible things suffer -50.

spells.name: Detect Traps
spells.description: As Detect Essence, but gives a 75% chance to detect a trap, modified by trap sophistication.

spells.name: Detect Evil
spells.description: Detects whether a being is evil, or whether an item was created by evil or long used by a very evil person.

spells.name: Location I
spells.description: Gives direction and distance to a specific familiar or well-described object or place.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Perceive Power I
spells.description: Estimates the power or level of the examined person, item, or spell.

spellLists.name: Elemental Shields
spellLists.summary: Open Essence protective spells against light, heat, cold, electricity, and elemental attack forms.

spells.name: Resist Light
spells.description: Protects against natural light effects and grants +10 to resistance rolls versus light/electricity and +10 DB against elemental electricity attacks.

spells.name: Resist Heat
spells.description: As Resist Light, but protects against natural heat to 200°F and applies the modifiers to heat.

spells.name: Resist Cold
spells.description: As Resist Light, but protects against natural cold to -20°F and applies the modifiers to cold.

spells.name: Resist Light Sphere
spells.description: As Resist Light, but protects all beings within 10' radius of the target.

spells.name: Resist Heat Sphere
spells.description: As Resist Heat, but protects all beings within 10' radius of the target.

spells.name: Resist Cold Sphere
spells.description: As Resist Cold, but protects all beings within 10' radius of the target.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Lightarmor
spells.description: As Resist Light, but protects against all natural light and electricity, with +20 to resistance rolls and DB.

spells.name: Heatarmor
spells.description: As Lightarmor, but protects against heat.

spells.name: Coldarmor
spells.description: As Lightarmor, but protects against cold.

spellLists.name: Essence Hand
spellLists.summary: Open Essence force spells for vibration, staying pressure, telekinesis, and guided missile aiming.

spells.name: Vibrations I
spells.description: Makes an object up to 1 pound vibrate rapidly; fragile objects may break, and held objects may be fumbled on a failed resistance roll.

spells.name: Staying I
spells.description: Exerts 1 pound of one-direction pressure on a person or object.

spells.name: Telekinesis I
spells.description: Moves one object up to 1 pound at up to 1' per second; if concentration stops, the object remains stationary as if stayed.

spells.name: Vibrations II
spells.description: As Vibrations I, but with a 5-pound mass limit.

spells.name: Staying II
spells.description: As Staying I, but with a 5-pound mass limit.

spells.name: Telekinesis II
spells.description: As Telekinesis I, but with a 5-pound mass limit.

spells.name: Vibrations III
spells.description: As Vibrations I, but with a 25-pound mass limit.

spells.name: Staying III
spells.description: As Staying I, but with a 25-pound mass limit.

spells.name: Vibrations IV
spells.description: As Vibrations I, but with a 50-pound mass limit.

spells.name: Aiming
spells.description: By concentrating on a missile firer and the missile's flight, the caster adds +50 to that missile's attack roll.

spellLists.name: Essence's Perceptions
spellLists.summary: Open Essence perception spells for presence, remote listening and seeing, enhanced senses, and telepathy.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Presence
spells.description: Makes the caster aware of all sentient or thinking beings within the area.

spells.name: Listen I
spells.description: Lets the caster choose a point up to 10' away and hear as if at that point.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Long Ear I
spells.description: Lets the caster move their point of hearing independently up to 100' away, moving 10' per round if physically reachable.

spells.name: Watch I
spells.description: As Listen I, but the caster sees from the fixed point, which can rotate.

spells.name: Long Eye I
spells.description: As Long Ear I, but the caster sees from the moving point, which can rotate.

spells.name: Listen II
spells.description: As Listen I, but with 100' range.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.description: Lets the caster read surface thoughts; if the target succeeds by more than 25, they realize someone is trying to read their thoughts.

spellLists.name: Lesser Illusions
spellLists.summary: Open Essence illusion spells for ventriloquism, mirages, glamours, phantasms, and delayed illusions.

spells.name: Ventriloquism
spells.description: Makes the caster's voice appear to come from any visible point within range.

spells.name: Sound/Light Mirage
spells.description: Creates a simple immobile image, scene, sound, or set of sounds within a 10' radius.

spells.name: Taste/Smell Mirage
spells.description: As Sound/Light Mirage, but creates immobile smells or tastes in the area.

spells.name: Illusions II
spells.description: Creates a simple immobile image or scene with one enhancement such as added sense, doubled duration, doubled range, or doubled radius.

spells.name: Phantasm I
spells.description: Creates the image of one object or being that moves while the caster concentrates and stops when concentration stops.

spells.name: Light Glamour
spells.description: Changes the visual appearance of one object up to 10 lb/lvl.

spells.name: Waiting Illusion II
spells.description: As Illusion II, but delayed up to 24 hours and triggered by time, movement, sound, smell, or taste.

spells.name: Illusions III
spells.description: As Illusions II, but two enhancement options may be chosen.

spells.name: Phantasm II
spells.description: As Phantasm I, but one enhancement option may be added, such as another sense, increased duration/range/radius, another image, or repetitive additions.

spells.name: Waiting Phantasm II
spells.description: As Phantasm II, but delayed like Waiting Illusion II; the phantasm may move, act on a simple command, or deliver a short speech if sound is included.

spellLists.name: Physical Enhancement
spellLists.summary: Open Essence enhancement spells for scale, hearing, balance, vision, voice, water breathing, and gas breathing.

spells.name: Mannish Scale
spells.description: Tells the caster an object's exact dimensions, mass, and/or weight.

spells.name: Sly Ears
spells.description: Doubles the target's normal hearing and grants bonuses to awareness skills involving hearing.

spells.name: Balance
spells.description: Grants +50 to maneuver rolls for slow maneuvers requiring balance.

spells.name: Nightvision
spells.description: Lets the target see 100' on a normal night as if it were daylight.

spells.name: Sidevision
spells.description: Gives the target a 300 degree field of vision, lowering flank and rear attack bonuses.

spells.name: Sounding
spells.description: Triples the target's voice loudness without affecting spell-casting capability.

spells.name: Watervision
spells.description: As Nightvision, but allows 100' sight through any water, including muddy or murky water.

spells.name: Waterlungs
spells.description: Allows the target to breathe water but not air.

spells.name: Heatvision
spells.description: As Nightvision, but sees varying degrees of heat on surfaces; it does not see through things or support detailed reading/mapping.

spells.name: Gaslungs
spells.description: As Waterlungs, but the target can breathe any gas as normal air.

spellLists.name: Rune Mastery
spellLists.summary: Open Essence spells for storing spells and inscribing spell runes on prepared paper.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Spell Store
spells.description: Stores one spell cast within one minute of Spell Store; the stored spell can later be cast as an instantaneous spell, and no other spell may be cast while one is stored.

spells.name: Rune I
spells.description: Inscribes a spell on specially prepared paper so it can be cast once; Rune I can inscribe only 1st-level spells.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Rune II
spells.description: As Rune I, but can inscribe spells up to 2nd level.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Rune III
spells.description: As Rune I, but can inscribe spells up to 3rd level.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Rune V
spells.description: As Rune I, but can inscribe spells up to 5th level.

spellLists.name: Spell Wall
spellLists.summary: Open Essence defensive spells for spell resistance, cancellation, dispelling, and realm-specific shields.

spells.name: Protection I
spells.description: Subtracts 5 from elemental attack rolls against the target and adds 5 to the target's resistance rolls versus spells.

spells.name: Cancel Essence
spells.description: Forces incoming Essence spells targeting the caster to make a resistance roll first; on failure, the incoming spell has no effect on the caster.

spells.name: Protection Sphere I
spells.description: As Protection I, but all beings within 10' radius of the target receive the benefits.

spells.name: Cancel Mentalism
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, but affects Mentalism spells.

spells.name: Protection II
spells.description: As Protection I, but the bonuses and penalties are 10.

spells.name: Cancel Channeling
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, but affects Channeling spells.

spells.name: Protection Sphere II
spells.description: As Protection II, but affects a 10' radius as in Protection Sphere I.

spells.name: Dispel Essence Sphere I
spells.description: As Cancel Essence, but affects an area centered on the caster; existing spells in the radius must resist with +30 or be cancelled.

spells.name: Essence Shield
spells.description: Creates a shield that subtracts 10 from frontal Essence attack rolls and can parry one spell attack if the caster takes no other action that round.

spells.name: Mind Shield
spells.description: As Essence Shield, but effective only against Mentalism spells.

spellLists.name: Unbarring Ways
spellLists.summary: Open Essence spells for locking, magical locks, lock and trap lore, opening, disarming, jamming, weakening, and prison opening.

spells.name: Lock
spells.description: Locks any visible lock within range as a normal lock, which can still be opened normally.

spells.name: Magic Lock
spells.description: Magically locks a door or container; it can be broken down or dispelled, but otherwise cannot be opened during the duration.

spells.name: Locklore
spells.description: Grants the caster +20 to pick the analyzed lock; someone instructed from the information gains +10.

spells.name: Opening I
spells.description: Gives a 20% chance to open a normal lock and 45% chance to open a Magic Lock, with a chance to set off associated traps.

spells.name: Traplore
spells.description: As Locklore, but applies to disarming traps.

spells.name: Disarm I
spells.description: As Opening I, but disarms traps; there is a chance the trap is set off.

spells.name: Jamming
spells.description: Causes a door to expand and jam into its frame, with severity determined by roll.

spells.name: Weakening
spells.description: Reduces a door's inherent strength by 50%; attempts to break it gain +50.

spells.name: Open Prison I
spells.description: Gives a 20% chance to unlock all locks in the area, or 45% for Magic Locks, rolling separately for each lock.

spells.name: Opening II
spells.description: As Opening I, but chance is 40%, or 90% for Magic Locks.

spellLists.name: Commanding Will
spellLists.summary: Mind-influencing magic that overrides emotions, thoughts, and will. Used to calm, confuse, command, and manipulate the feelings and actions of others.

spells.name: Calm
spells.description: Target will take no aggressive/offensive action and will fight only if attacked. If cast at an already calmed target, the target falls asleep.

spells.name: Truth
spells.description: Target must answer the next question the caster asks truthfully.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.description: Target is incapable of making decisions or initiating action; may continue to fight current foes or in self-defence.

spells.name: Fascinate
spells.description: Target believes the caster is of the same alignment, is influential, and is superior; will seek to ingratiate himself to the caster.

spells.name: Command
spells.description: Target obeys a command of up to 5 words. Cannot be completely alien to the target; caster must speak a language the target understands.

spells.name: Forget
spells.description: Target permanently forgets up to 1 min/lvl of specified memories. Memories older than 1 day gain +20 RR, older than 1 week +40 RR. Memories older than 1 month cannot be forgotten.

spells.name: Call of the Wild
spells.description: Target domesticated animal reverts to a wild state for the duration.

spells.name: Emote
spells.description: Caster causes the target to experience any one specified emotion. Caster cannot dictate the direction the target will choose to express the emotion.

spells.name: Inclination
spells.description: Target likes or dislikes a person, place, or thing as specified by the caster.

spells.name: Fear
spells.description: Target flees in total fear from the caster's location for 1 min per 5% failure and will not return for 1 day/5% failure.

spells.name: Doubt
spells.description: Target develops a very serious and troublesome doubt concerning a previously accepted fact, action, or idea.

spells.name: Love/Hate
spells.description: As Inclination, except target experiences devoted love or repulsive hatred. At end of duration, target makes additional RR (+20) or effect becomes permanent (lesser degree).

spells.name: Vengeance
spells.description: Target will seek to enact vengeance against a person, place, or thing specified by the caster. There must be some concept in the target's mind that the subject has wronged him.

spells.name: Invoke
spells.description: Caster summons an extra-planar creature (demon, elemental, etc.) whose True name he knows. Each round there is a 35% chance the creature hears and appears. Does not command the entity.

spells.name: Quarrels
spells.description: All targets within area of effect become hostile and seek to attack the nearest opponent.

spells.name: Dismiss/Banish
spells.description: An extra-planar creature whose True name the caster knows is dismissed to its home plane, or banished from the caster's plane for 100 years/10% failure (+20 RR mod). Cancels caster's control spells.

spells.name: Shout of Panic
spells.description: All targets in radius flee in total panic from the caster.

spells.name: Peace
spells.description: Target is eased from effects of mind disease, grief, lycanthropy, hate, etc. for the duration.

spells.name: Shout of Confusion
spells.description: As Confusion, except affects all targets in radius.

spells.name: Shout of Command
spells.description: As Command, except affects all targets in radius.

spells.name: Slumber
spells.description: Target sleeps in a deep, unwakable sleep without aging or deterioration until dispelled, a set condition is met, or the duration ends.

spells.name: Insanity
spells.description: Target develops a permanent mental disorder. Caster can dictate the general type; exact effects are GM's choice.

spells.name: Slave
spells.description: Target becomes the caster's unquestioning slave. Target may attempt a new RR at the end of each week to break the effect.

spellLists.name: Inscriptions
spellLists.summary: Rune and sign magic for the Runemage. Allows inscription of spells onto paper (Runes) and magical triggers onto surfaces (Signs). Signs affect any being that triggers them; Runes are single-use stored spells.

spells.name: Observation Sign
spells.description: Caster inscribes an Observation Sign — a point of reference for Signwatch and Sign of Transport spells. Max active signs = half caster's level (rounded up). Can cancel any sign by concentrating and touching it.

spells.name: Rune II
spells.description: Inscribes a 1st or 2nd level spell on specially prepared rune paper. The inscribed spell can be cast once by activating the rune. Spell to be inscribed must be cast within 1 minute. Can be set to affect the reader.

spells.name: Sign of Pain
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] Sign inscribed on any non-mobile surface; triggers on specified condition. Target takes 25% of remaining concussion hits. Effect lasts 10 min per 5% RR failure.

spells.name: Rune III
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 3rd level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Weakness
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Pain, except target feels weak. Results in -20 to all manoeuvres and attacks for 10 min per 5% RR failure.

spells.name: Inscription Analysis
spells.description: Caster determines what spell is inscribed in a rune or sign, and whether it is set to affect a reader. 1% chance per level of the inscribed spell of triggering it.

spells.name: Rune V
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 5th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Shock
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Pain, except target is in a state of shock for 10 min per 5% failure (treated as stunned but never passes out).

spells.name: Rune VI
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 6th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Fear
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Pain, except target flees the location of the sign. Target may not return for 10 min per 5% RR failure.

spells.name: Rune VII
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 7th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Transport
spells.description: As Sign of Pain, except target is teleported to one of the caster's designated Observation Signs, up to 1 mile/level of caster away at time of inscription.

spells.name: Rune VIII
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 8th level spells.

spells.name: Signwatch
spells.description: Caster can see and hear as if at any one of his Observation Signs within range. Vision can rotate around the sign point.

spells.name: Rune X
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 10th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Torment
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Pain, except target takes 90% of remaining hits.

spells.name: Inscription Analysis True
spells.description: As Inscription Analysis. If caster has analysed work by the same creator before, learns creator's identity and rune's age. Otherwise learns the creator's profession, level, and age of the rune. 1% chance per level of triggering.

spells.name: Rune XV
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 15th level spells.

spells.name: Sign of Blinding
spells.description: [RR Mod: -20] As Sign of Pain, except target is blinded for 1 hour per 5% RR failure.

spells.name: Lord Rune
spells.description: As Rune II, except can inscribe up to 20th level spells.

spells.name: Signwatch True
spells.description: As Signwatch, except for range.

spells.name: Mass Sign
spells.description: Caster may inscribe any lower-level Sign on this list, except it can affect a number of targets equal to the caster's level before being cancelled.

spells.name: Rune of Power
spells.description: Caster stores a number of power points in a sheet of rune paper equal to the level of this spell. Stored PPs are the same realm as the caster; cannot be multiplied when the rune is activated.

spellLists.name: Nomenclature Mastery
spellLists.summary: Language, memory, and True Name magic for the Runemage. Enables perfect recall, accelerated language learning, reading of unknown tongues, discovery of True Names, and binding of targets through their True Name.

spells.name: Memorize I
spells.description: Allows the caster to retain anything he reads or learns as if he had a photographic memory with total recall for the duration.

spells.name: Text Analysis III
spells.description: Caster can read text written in an unknown language as though he has rank 3 written in that language. Does not convey the spoken sounds of the language.

spells.name: Learn Language II
spells.description: Cuts study time in half and allows caster to develop one rank higher in a language than his teacher or book would normally allow.

spells.name: Vocalize II
spells.description: Causes any written text to be vocalized aloud in the language in which it is written, heard in the caster's voice. Only reads up to rank 3 linguistic level; concepts beyond rank 3 are skipped or incomprehensible.

spells.name: Organic Name
spells.description: Caster learns the True Name of a target non-living organic item. That item is at -25 to all RRs against spells cast by this caster. Max one True Name known per level (includes all True Names).

spells.name: Memorize II
spells.description: As Memorize I, except for duration.

spells.name: Text Analysis V
spells.description: As Text Analysis III, except text can be read to rank 5 of complexity.

spells.name: Vocalize V
spells.description: As Vocalize II, except the writing is read at rank 5 of complexity.

spells.name: History
spells.description: Caster learns the area of origin of target item, the race of its maker, and when it was made (within 100 years). Also determines if the item has cultural or historical significance (not what those significances are).

spells.name: Animal Name
spells.description: As Organic Name, except caster learns the True Name of a target animal.

spells.name: Learn Language III
spells.description: As Learn Language II, except study time is one third normal and caster can learn up to two ranks higher than teacher or source book allows.

spells.name: Text Analysis VII
spells.description: As Text Analysis III, except text can be read to rank 7 of complexity.

spells.name: Vocalize VII
spells.description: As Vocalize II, except the writing is read at rank 7 of complexity.

spells.name: Inorganic Name
spells.description: As Organic Name, except caster learns the True Name of a non-living inorganic item.

spells.name: Disguise Name
spells.description: Caster disguises himself from any attempt to decipher his True Name. Any Name spell targeting the caster must make an RR with a -20 modifier or fail to provide the True Name.

spells.name: Text Analysis X
spells.description: As Text Analysis III, except text can be read to rank 10 of complexity.

spells.name: Vocalize X
spells.description: As Vocalize II, except the writing is read at rank 10 of complexity.

spells.name: Creature Name
spells.description: As Organic Name, except caster learns the True Name of any target creature.

spells.name: Learn Language IV
spells.description: As Learn Language II, except study time is one quarter normal and caster can learn three ranks higher than normally allowed.

spells.name: Cryptics
spells.description: Caster can decipher any target code into the original language, or encode a message so that it is nonsense to anyone other than a designated target (target caster designates at casting).

spells.name: Restore Text True
spells.description: Restores any text to its original condition so long as at least half of it is present. Repairs any damage other than lost or destroyed pages; lost pages are replaced with a 75% accurate replication.

spells.name: Binding Name
spells.description: Caster binds a target by its True Name (must have learned it via this list). Target suffers -35 to RRs against this caster. Must make a Hard maneuver to move more than 100' away or to attempt to harm the caster.

spells.name: Change Name
spells.description: Caster may alter his own True Name. Requires a significant life-changing event. Frees caster from all Binding Names and Name spells. If the GM deems the change insufficient, the spell auto-fails and the failure chart is rolled three times.

spellLists.name: Physical Manipulations
spellLists.summary: Direct manipulation of physical matter — transforming, destroying, animating, and reshaping earth, wood, stone, metal, gas, and liquid. Also includes organic destruction through rot, bleed, and petrification.

spells.name: Ice/Water
spells.description: Caster converts 1 cubic foot of water to ice, or ice to water.

spells.name: Warp
spells.description: Target wooden object has its form, straightness, and strength ruined; doubles break number range (max 1-10) and halves original strength. Object may not be larger than 1 pound per caster level.

spells.name: Dust Earth/Wood
spells.description: Caster instantly transforms 1 cubic foot of earth or wood into a fine, dry powder.

spells.name: Dust Stone
spells.description: As Dust Earth/Wood, except affects 1 cubic foot of stone.

spells.name: Animate Gas
spells.description: Caster animates 1 cu'/level of any gaseous substance within range. Gas moves at caster's will (1'/level/round). Beyond 10'R/lvl it is no longer controlled. Caster may issue a final command for 1 round/level.

spells.name: Rust
spells.description: All metal on target object oxidizes at a rate of 1 cubic inch per round.

spells.name: Animate Liquid
spells.description: As Animate Gas, except affects liquid.

spells.name: Dust to Stone
spells.description: Caster converts 1 cubic foot of sand, dirt, or dust into a solid stone form. The stone formed takes the same general shape as the original substance.

spells.name: Warp Metal
spells.description: As Warp Wood, except affects metal objects up to 1 pound per level of the caster.

spells.name: Bleed
spells.description: Target living creature bleeds at a rate of 1 hit per round per 5% RR failure (e.g., fail by 25 = bleed 5 hits/round for 5 rounds).

spells.name: Mass Ice/Water
spells.description: As Ice/Water, except affects up to 10 cubic feet.

spells.name: Animate Solid
spells.description: As Animate Gas, except affects 1 cubic inch per level of solid material.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.description: Target inorganic item up to 1 cubic foot explodes. All targets within 5' take an 'A' Impact critical; the holder takes a 'C' Impact critical.

spells.name: Lesser Unstone
spells.description: As Dust Stone, except affects up to 10 cubic feet of stone.

spells.name: Wither
spells.description: Target normal plant (shrub-size or smaller) instantly dies and withers. Magical, large, or unusual plants may resist (+20 modifier).

spells.name: Lesser Animation
spells.description: Target Animate spell from this list has its duration increased to 1 min/level. Caster may give the animated material simple commands without needing to concentrate.

spells.name: Unmetal
spells.description: As Dust Earth/Wood, except 1 cubic inch of metal may be affected.

spells.name: Eternal Lock
spells.description: Target lock is magically fused shut. The lock may be broken but will never unlock.

spells.name: Shatter True
spells.description: As Shatter, except object may be up to 3 cubic feet; all within 10' take a 'B' Impact critical, holder takes a 'D' Impact critical.

spells.name: Rot
spells.description: Target living creature rots at a cumulative -10 penalty to all actions per round and loses 10% of current hits each round. If target leaves range, the spell is cancelled (damage taken is not reversed).

spells.name: Greater Animation
spells.description: As Lesser Animation, except for duration.

spells.name: Petrify
spells.description: Living or organic target gradually turns to stone at 5% of total mass per round. Effect may be dispelled or removed with Remove Curse, but the petrified target resists dispelling at +20.

spells.name: Petrify True
spells.description: As Petrify, except the petrified target resists all dispelling attempts at +40.

spellLists.name: Symbolism
spellLists.summary: Permanent magical trap-symbols emplaced on stone, surfaces, or living creatures. Symbols store spells that trigger automatically on defined conditions. Companion list to [[Inscriptions]] (for rune paper and signs).

spells.name: Bypass Symbol I
spells.description: Allows the caster to "turn off" a target Symbol I for the duration. If the Symbol I fails an RR, it cannot be triggered and its constant effects are inactive. RR is based on the inscribed spell's level vs. the Bypass spell's level.

spells.name: Unsymbol I
spells.description: Caster can remove one Symbol I (a placed 1st level spell). RR is based on the inscribed spell's level vs. the Bypass spell's level.

spells.name: Symbol I
spells.description: Caster emplaces one 1st level spell on a stone slab weighing at least 2,000 lbs. The spell to be placed must be cast within 1 minute of this spell, within 10'. Trigger: time period, movement, sound, touch, or reading. Only one Symbol per continuous slab. Attack level = spell level (always 1).

spells.name: Symbol Extension
spells.description: Connects a distant trigger surface to a symbol outside of its normal range. Distance between trigger and symbol can be up to 1 foot per caster level. Must be in place before the symbol is inscribed.

spells.name: Bypass Symbol III
spells.description: As Bypass Symbol I, except affects up to a Symbol III.

spells.name: Unsymbol III
spells.description: As Unsymbol I, except affects up to a Symbol III.

spells.name: Symbol III
spells.description: As Symbol I, except emplaces up to a 3rd level spell.

spells.name: Bypass Symbol V
spells.description: As Bypass Symbol I, except affects up to a Symbol V.

spells.name: Unsymbol V
spells.description: As Unsymbol I, except affects up to a Symbol V.

spells.name: Symbol V
spells.description: As Symbol I, except emplaces up to a 5th level spell.

spells.name: Bypass Symbol VIII

spells.name: Inscribe Sign
spells.description: Allows caster to modify any imbedded symbol on this list to allow it to be emplaced on a mobile surface. The sign remains potent until triggered. Mobile surface must be non-living, weighing at least 100 lbs. Max one mobile sign per caster level.

spells.name: Unsymbol True
spells.description: As Unsymbol I, except caster can remove any spell of a level less than his own (e.g., a 50th level Runemage could remove a 49th level spell, but not a 50th level spell).

spells.name: Living Sign
spells.description: As Inscribe Sign, except target must be a living creature weighing at least 50 lbs. The sign remains potent until triggered. Often disguised by incorporating into existing tattoos.

spellLists.name: Warding Ways
spellLists.summary: Ward magic for the Runemage. Creates magical barriers that block creatures, undead, demons, or magic realms from entering or passing through an area. Requires prepared ward signs inscribed at the centre or endpoints of the warded area.

spells.name: Research Ward
spells.description: Allows caster to research special ward spells for use with this list. Also grants a +25 bonus to the next Ward Lore manoeuvre.

spells.name: Detect Ward
spells.description: Detects all active wards within the area of effect. Caster can move the area of effect each round.

spells.name: Alarm Ward
spells.description: When cast on a prepared ward, sounds an alarm when a specified condition occurs in the area. May be silent (caster-only at 100'/level) or audible. Can sound for as long as condition exists or for up to 1 min/level before going dormant.

spells.name: Sense Ward
spells.description: Prevents the use of one designated sense through the area of effect. Caster may add additional senses by spending double the PPs (each extra sense adds one effective level to the ward for Ward Lore purposes).

spells.name: Lesser Animal Ward
spells.description: Prevents passage of animals into or through the area. Animals that attempt to pass make an RR at -20 or go elsewhere; if forced through they suffer -25 to all actions while inside.

spells.name: Lesser Undead Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Animal Ward, except affects lesser spirits of the dead (Class I, II, and III).

spells.name: Lesser Demon Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Animal Ward, except affects lesser demons (Type I, II, and III).

spells.name: Lesser Essence Ward
spells.description: Prevents the casting of Essence spells through the area of effect. All Essence spells must first resist versus the level of the ward, or be cancelled. Active spells that pass through the area must make an RR or be dispelled.

spells.name: Lesser Mentalism Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Essence Ward, except prevents the use of Mentalism spells.

spells.name: Lesser Channeling Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Essence Ward, except prevents the use of Channeling spells.

spells.name: Multiple Ward
spells.description: Allows caster to combine multiple wards into one prepared ward sign. All wards involved must be cast immediately after this spell (within 2 minutes).

spells.name: Lesser Barrier Ward
spells.description: Prevents all creatures from passing into or through the area of effect. Any creature attempting to pass makes a -20 RR or is blocked. No effect on Class IV–VI undead or Type IV–VI demons.

spells.name: Greater Animal Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Animal Ward, except animals must make a -40 RR.

spells.name: Greater Undead Ward
spells.description: As Greater Animal Ward, except Class I–III undead make a -40 RR and Class IV–VI undead make a normal RR.

spells.name: Conceal Ward
spells.description: Turns the ward signs of any ward invisible. The ward is still detectable by a Detect Ward spell.

spells.name: Greater Demon Ward
spells.description: As Greater Animal Ward, except Type I–III demons make a -40 RR and Type IV–VI demons make a normal RR.

spells.name: Greater Essence Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Essence Ward, except for duration.

spells.name: Greater Mentalism Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Mentalism Ward, except for duration.

spells.name: Greater Channeling Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Channeling Ward, except for duration.

spells.name: Greater Barrier Ward
spells.description: As Lesser Barrier Ward, except any creature attempting to pass makes a -40 RR. Class IV–VI undead and Type IV–VI demons resist at +10.

spells.name: Lord Research
spells.description: See Spell Law Section 7.4.

spells.name: Defensive Ward
spells.description: Enchants one ward to have an additional defence against its designated creature type. Whenever the designated creature enters the area of effect, the ward delivers an 'E' Impact critical (regardless of RR result).

spells.name: Ward True
spells.description: When cast on any lower-level ward, increases that ward's duration to 1 day/level of the caster.

spellLists.name: Anticipations
spellLists.summary: Open Mentalism spells for short-term foresight, intuition, hostile intent, dreams, and sensing recent events.

spells.name: Anticipate Missile
spells.description: Alerts the caster to missiles fired at them that round; if able to move, the caster gains +50 DB against one chosen missile attack.

spells.name: Anticipate Blow
spells.description: As Anticipate Missile, but applies to melee attacks.

spells.name: Guess
spells.description: Biases an uncertain choice among a limited set of options in the caster's favor by 25%; the caster cannot reuse Guess for the same information until skill rank improves.

spells.name: Anticipate Spell
spells.description: As Anticipate Missile, but applies to spell attacks, giving defensive bonuses against directed elemental, area elemental, or base spell attacks.

spells.name: Intuitions I
spells.description: Gives the caster a vision of what will probably happen in the next minute if they take a specified action.

spells.name: Anticipate Hostility
spells.description: Alerts the caster to active hostile intent directed specifically at them within the area.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Dream I
spells.description: Produces a dream about a topic chosen before sleeping; usable once per night and requires at least one normal sleep cycle.

spells.name: Room Feel I
spells.description: Shows what occurred in a room or place, limited to up to one minute per level into the past and constrained by the area of effect.

spells.name: Anticipations
spells.description: Predicts the target's most probable action in the next round in broad terms, allowing the caster to declare after hearing the target's stated intent.

spellLists.name: Attack Avoidance
spellLists.summary: Open Mentalism defensive spells that turn, deflect, or misdirect incoming attacks and create protective still air.

spells.name: Turn Missile
spells.description: Deflects one visible missile passing within range, subtracting 20 from the missile's attack.

spells.name: Turn Blade
spells.description: As Turn Missile, but applies to one melee attack.

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: Creates an invisible force shield in front of the caster, functioning like a normal shield without occupying a hand.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Deflect I
spells.description: As Turn Missile, but subtracts 100 from the missile attack.

spells.name: Bladeturn I
spells.description: Deflects one visible melee attack within range, subtracting 50 from the attack.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Aim Untrue I
spells.description: Deflects one visible missile within range so it automatically misses its target.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Still Air
spells.description: Creates a pocket of still air around the caster that excludes outside gas for the spell duration.

spellLists.name: Brilliance
spellLists.summary: Open Mentalism light, darkness, aura, and shock spells.

spells.name: Projected Light
spells.description: Projects a flashlight-like beam from the caster's palm; closing the hand shuts it off until opened again.

spells.name: Glow
spells.description: Creates a small soft light, enough for Nightvision to work properly but not enough for easy movement in darkness.

spells.name: Light I
spells.description: Lights a 10' radius around the touched point; if the point moves, the light moves with it.

spells.name: Self Aura
spells.description: Creates a bright aura around the caster, making them seem more powerful and subtracting 5 from all attacks against them.

spells.name: Light Eruption
spells.description: Creates a burst of intense light; targets in the area are stunned for one round per 10 failure.

spells.name: Shock Bolt
spells.description: Fires a bolt of intense charged light, resolved on the source's Bolt Spell Attack Table.

spells.name: Darkness I
spells.description: As Light I, but creates a 10' radius of normal darkness.

spells.name: True Aura
spells.description: As Self Aura, but the aura appears extremely powerful and subtracts 15 from all attacks against the caster.

spells.name: No spell listed
spells.description: No spell is listed at this level in the source.

spells.name: Light V
spells.description: As Light I, but creates a 50' radius of light.

spellLists.name: Cloaking
spellLists.summary: Open Mentalism spells for blurring, shadowing, invisibility, cloaking, disguise, and mental shadow duplicates.

spells.name: Blur
spells.description: Makes the caster appear blurred to attackers, subtracting 10 from attacks directed at them.

spells.name: Shadow
spells.description: Makes the caster and carried objects appear shadowed, making them almost invisible in dark areas and often aiding Stalking/Hiding.

spells.name: Unseen
spells.description: Makes one object invisible until the duration ends, it is struck violently, or it makes a violent move.

spells.name: Cloaking I
spells.description: On a failed resistance roll, one target cannot see the caster; obvious actions may allow another resistance roll and attacks allow a resistance roll with +50.

spells.name: Facades I
spells.description: A limited illusion that makes the caster look like any humanoid figure within 20% of their size.

spells.name: Cloaking III
spells.description: As Cloaking I, but affects three targets with one base attack roll.

spells.name: Cloaking Sphere I
spells.description: As Cloaking I, but affects targets in the area; each target resists once, and a successful resistance ends that target's need to resist again.

spells.name: Cloaking V
spells.description: As Cloaking I, but affects five targets with one base attack roll.

spells.name: Cloaking Sphere II
spells.description: As Cloaking Sphere I, but affects a 20' radius.

spells.name: Shadow Mentalist I
spells.description: Creates a duplicate of the caster that either mimics them or moves under concentration; while concentrating, the caster can merge and split from the duplicate to confuse observers.

spells.name: Cold Resistance

cultures.name: Aerial Culture
cultures.summary: Aerial cultures are shaped by high mountains, cliffs, aeries, and the open sky. Their communities tend to be remote, practical, and physically capable, with customs built around climbing, weather, altitude, and the danger of exposed terrain.

cultures.name: Aquatic Culture
cultures.summary: Aquatic cultures live in, on, or around major bodies of water. They may be fully underwater societies, island peoples, lake dwellers, river communities, or coastal groups whose identity is inseparable from currents, tides, fishing, and navigation.

cultures.name: Arctic Culture
cultures.summary: Arctic cultures are formed by snow, ice, tundra, long winters, and scarce resources. Their lives revolve around hunting, fishing, herding, shelter craft, careful travel, and the discipline needed to survive where mistakes are expensive.

cultures.name: Desert Culture
cultures.summary: Desert cultures are defined by arid lands, scarce water, long travel, harsh heat, cold nights, and social systems that protect survival knowledge. They may be nomads, oasis dwellers, raiders, merchants, soldiers, or urban peoples whose cities depend on desert routes.

cultures.name: Highland Culture
cultures.summary: Highland cultures occupy rugged hills, uplands, broken valleys, and hard-to-cross country. They are often clan-based, independent, and accustomed to raids, feuds, herding, scouting, and rough travel.

cultures.name: Littoral Culture
cultures.summary: Littoral cultures live along coasts, islands, river deltas, harbors, and sea roads. They are shaped by fishing, shipping, boats, storms, trade, tides, and the mix of strangers that comes with ports.

ranks.name: Spells - Own Realm Open Lists, one list

cultures.name: Mining Culture
cultures.summary: Mining cultures are built around quarrying, tunneling, ore, stone, workshops, and the settlements that grow around underground labor. They are practical, disciplined, and often strongly tied to craft, family, guild, or clan.

cultures.name: Plains Culture
cultures.summary: Plains cultures belong to grasslands, steppe, savanna, prairie, and open farming or herding regions. Their lives are shaped by distance, weather, animals, crops, raids, trade routes, and the visibility of everything under the sky.

cultures.name: Rural Culture
cultures.summary: Rural cultures grow from farms, villages, orchards, mills, pastures, and small market communities. They are shaped by food, seasons, family, animals, land rights, neighbors, and the steady labor of ordinary survival.

cultures.name: Subterranean Culture
cultures.summary: Subterranean cultures live below the surface in caves, tunnels, deep cities, vaults, and underworld passages. They are formed by darkness, enclosed space, stone, hidden routes, scarce surface contact, and whatever old things share the depths.

cultures.name: Sylvan Culture
cultures.summary: Sylvan cultures live in forests, deep woods, sacred groves, and tree-shadowed settlements. They are shaped by plants, animals, stealth, seasonal abundance, forest law, and the duty to preserve a living environment.
